name: oncall_bot
display_name: 飞书 oncall 通知机器人
description: 向字节内部飞书群发消息。用 unispace-oncall 自建应用身份，支持卡片消息、文本消息、@ 提及。

actions.name: send_text
actions.description: Send a plain text message to a chat

actions.name: send_card
actions.description: Send an interactive card (title + fields + buttons)

actions.name: send_rich_text
actions.description: Send rich text with images, links, @mentions

actions.name: list_chats
actions.description: List chats accessible to the bot

_demo_note: UniSpace demo does not hit Lark's open API. Any send action is logged and echoed back. In production this would obtain a tenant access token and POST to /open-apis/im/v1/messages.
